title: Old UI for Legacy4J
description: Bring back the user interface from older versions of Legacy Console Edition for Legacy4J!
body:
# Old UI For Legacy4J

**This resource pack requires Legacy4J**

Originally from Rekindled Legacy, this pack brings back much of the user interface from older versions of the Legacy Console Edition for the Legacy4J mod, taking advantage of FactoryAPI to help recreate these screens.

## How to Apply
You can apply the pack in Global Resource Packs or within a Resource Album. Below is an example of what the order should be if you're using a modpack like [Simply Legacy](https://modrinth.com/project/simply-legacy)
<details>
<summary>Pack Order</summary>

```
  TU7 Panorama

  (above would be for something like a panorama resource pack)
  Old UI for Legacy4J
  (below would be stuff you wouldn't want messing with the old UI,
   like packs that include custom Control Types and Minecraft titles)

  Legacy Titles
  Tooltips Enhanced
  Legacy Panorama
  Legacy Modpack Resources

  [other resource packs or an applied Resource Album]
```

</details>


## Features
### Old Play Game Screen

![Old Play Game Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LIHfShYl/images/80eac5018def480d13488a28addfb7c6c7ee67fb.png)

### Old Loading Screen
- Dynamically changes between the Xbox 360 and Xbox One variants depending on UI Mode

![Loading Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LIHfShYl/images/97316f41aaddb9cc35a026499198ad0900a3d77d.png)

### Old Xbox 360 and Xbox One Control Types
  - Old Xbox 360 Edition logo

### Old Crafting Menus (without the type tabs)

![Old Crafting Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LIHfShYl/images/70fd016f6db536bc3eb53a3fb3d81dc609daaef9.png)

### Narrower Pause Menu

![Narrow Pause Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LIHfShYl/images/b3dbd2c2e0babfd663293bc04af16b91eba269ce.png)

### (optional) Vanilla asset overrides
- Intended for vanilla-style packs that change button textures

![No Vanilla Assets vs. With Vanilla Assets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efa7149dae64a73302125b13890c1b37ad1fbd8c.png)

### Old Navigation Sound

## Best Paired With
- The [LCE Panorama Collection](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lce-panorama-collection) for various old console panoramas
- The [Tutorial World Add-on](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tutorial-world-addon) for the old tutorial worlds
- [Legacy Titles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legacy-titles) for the various newer Console Edition logos

## Credits
- [Wilyicaro](https://modrinth.com/user/Wilyicaro) for creating the original "Legacy4J TU0" pack and porting the old Xbox 360 Control Icons
- [agari](https://modrinth.com/user/Agarialo), [Panduino](https://modrinth.com/user/Panduino-Dev) and [omo50](https://modrinth.com/user/rjxkenshin) for maintaining the version used in [Rekindled Legacy](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rekindled-legacy)
- [Cjnator38](https://modrinth.com/user/Cjnator38) for recreating the Xbox One Control Icons and updating/adapting the pack for wider use
